title: viola fraterna
intro: Viola fraterna, also known as the fraternal pansy, is a type of flowering plant in the violet family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Viola fraterna include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress. The herbal preparations of Viola fraterna include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas, added to food, or taken in capsule form.
